geopolitics_summary: Iran war elevates EU energy security concerns; Trump's unpredictability reshapes transatlantic dynamics; Russia shadow-fleet sanctions and Ukraine conflict persist.

themes.headline: Iran war prompts Portugal to halve fossil fuel use in decade
themes.why_it_matters: Policy acceleration toward renewables on Iran war cost shock. Reduces European gas demand, pressuring TTF but strengthening renewable build-out; modestly bearish for gas, bullish for power grid decarbonization.

themes.headline: EU doubles down on carbon tax for international flights
themes.why_it_matters: Signals tightening EU ETS scope and carbon pricing ambition; extends carbon market reach to aviation. Supportive of EUA prices; marginal uplift to power via fuel-switch logic if aviation fuel constraints rise.

themes.headline: Putin's shadow fleet faces fresh EU sanctions blitz
themes.why_it_matters: Sanctions on Russian oil export infrastructure may tighten crude supply, lifting Brent and reducing LNG arb flows to Europe. Higher fuel oil / gas-substitute demand offsets lower gas volumes; net bearish for power prices via fuel-cost pass-through.

themes.headline: Ukraine sea drones disrupt Russian oil exports, Greece protests escalation
themes.why_it_matters: Shadow-fleet targeting tightens Russian crude flow to market. Brent upside risk; alternative fuel substitution (fuel oil, LNG) into EU increases, raising marginal thermal generation costs and power prices.

themes.headline: Trump-style anti-windmill campaigns gain traction across Europe
themes.why_it_matters: Political headwinds to EU renewable build-out via social-media disinformation. Slows wind deployment, tightening future clean power supply curve and supporting forward power prices (Cal+1, Cal+2).

watchlist: EU shadow-fleet sanctions enforcement timeline and impact on Russian Urals export volumes.
Portugal fossil-fuel reduction legislative timetable; renewable auction schedule impact.
Iran war spillover effects on LNG pricing and North Africa supply route security.
Trump trade negotiations and EU "European Preference" industrial policy responses—subsidy / tariff risk.
